projectDescription: A machine learning project that uses Random Forest classifiers and MLB Statcast data to classify batter performance across three dimensions: overall offensive performance, elite status, and plate discipline.
keyFeatures: Three target variable classification: overall performance (Low/Medium/High), elite status (Elite vs Non-Elite), and plate discipline
Random Forest classifiers trained on 76 Statcast features covering 911 MLB batters (2023-2025)
Feature importance analysis identifying the most predictive batting metrics (xwOBA, hits, barrels)
Integration of traditional stats (BA, HR) with advanced Statcast metrics (launch speed, bat speed, barrel rate)
Exploratory data analysis and visualization comparing wOBA vs xwOBA, hard hit rates, and plate discipline patterns
Model evaluation with accuracy, precision, recall, and F1 score metrics
Data from MLB Statcast covering 2023-2025 regular season at-bats
publicApiSurface: RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=300, max_depth=8, random_state=42) — performance classification model
RandomForestClassifier(n_estimators=300, max_depth=8, class_weight='balanced', random_state=42) — elite classification model
Target variable: Rendimiento_labels (Bajo/Medio/Alto) — overall offensive performance
Target variable: elite_hitter (0/1) — elite batter classification (top 20% wOBA)
Target variable: plate_discipline — strike zone decision quality
Features for performance model: xwoba, hardhit_percent, barrels_total, hits
Features for elite model: xwoba, hardhit_percent, barrels_total, slg, xslg
Data source: MLB Statcast (baseballsavant.mlb.com), 2023-2025 regular season, 911 batters, 76 features
